Package aim4.im.v2i.RequestHandler

Class ApproxSimpleTrafficSignalRequestHandler

java.lang.Object
aim4.im.v2i.RequestHandler.ApproxSimpleTrafficSignalRequestHandler
All Implemented Interfaces:
RequestHandler, TrafficSignalRequestHandler
public class ApproxSimpleTrafficSignalRequestHandler extends Object implements TrafficSignalRequestHandler
The approximate traffic signal request handler.
